title: LSS 401 Stun Cuffs
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''LSS 401''' [[Stuncuffs/Legends|Stun cuffs]] were a pair of of modified handcuffs used during the period following the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] war. They were known as a less sophisticated version of the [[LSS 1000 Automatic Stun Cuffs]].

LS 401s were operated by remote, and could inflict varying degrees of pain upon the prisoner. [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and her Master, [[Saba Sebatyne]], captured onboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Admiral Ackbar (Victory-class)|''Admiral Ackbar'']], were fitted with stun cuffs by Admiral [[Nek Bwua'tu]]'s security guards in the [[Murgo Choke]]. Giving their word as [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]], the prisoners eventually had their stun cuffs removed, but remained incarcerated onboard the vessel.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]''
